name: Kotobukiya Co., Ltd.
summary: Kotobukiya Co., Ltd. plans, designs, develops, creates, wholesales, and retails hobby goods in Japan and internationally. It provides plastic figures, model kits, and character/lifestyle goods. The company is also involved in the import and export business. It offers its products through stores in Tachikawa, Akihabara, and Nipponbashi, as well as online shop. Kotobukiya Co., Ltd. was founded in 1953 and is based in Tachikawa, Japan.
